summary: Created thread-close skill with SKILL.md and close.py wrapper
learnings: The fail-safe guard system is working correctly - it detected this Drop context and properly suggested drop-close instead of thread-close. The --force override works as expected for testing/edge cases.

decisions.rationale: Standard practice for CLI scripts to be directly executable

decisions.choice: Used exact SKILL.md content from brief
decisions.rationale: Specification was precise and complete, no customization needed
